summary.rationale: User constraint 'do not modify existing components' converts the only structural mismatches (Eligibility two-image variant; data-driven SiteFooter) into NEW sibling components rather than extensions of existing ones.

components.rationale: Existing `Header` default export already renders the top nav bar with dropdowns + Enquire CTA + mobile drawer. Figma instance is identical in intent. No props consumed by Figma decomposition — pure shell.

Existing `CourseHeroSection` accepts {breadcrumb,title,subtitle,meta,ctaLabel,ctaHref,heroImage}. Maps 1:1 to Figma props with field renames only: decomposition `body` → `subtitle`, decomposition `chips` → `meta`, decomposition `ctaLabel` → `ctaLabel` (same). Two-column green-wash layout matches. Build-planner will wire the new data.

`CourseMetaChip` is a 110x104 rounded-rectangle with icon+label — identical shape to ScheduleChip. Already used inside CourseHeroSection via an ICON_MAP for calendar/location/clock/globe — exactly the 4 chip types the new Figma needs.
`CourseSectionNav` accepts items[{label,href,active}] and renders pill-active + plain links inside a bordered band. Matches Figma 1:7980 verbatim (incl. typo preservation by the data layer).
`CourseOverviewSection` takes {eyebrow,heading,paragraphs}. Decomposition `title` → `heading`. Figma layout (eyebrow + h2 + 2 paragraphs, no image) matches the existing component exactly.

`HighlightsSection` takes {eyebrow,heading,items:[{icon,title,body}]}. Decomposition `title` → `heading`. The 6 Figma icon refs map to the existing ICON_RESOLVER keys yoga / align-center / strength / leaf / technology / people. Eyebrow uses text-text-brand-deep token which already exists in globals.css. 2-col grid matches.
`HighlightCard` is 52x52 icon tile + title + body in a bordered rounded-2xl card — matches Figma 641x151 highlight card shape.

`CurriculumSection` takes {eyebrow,heading,items:[{title,body}],nextHref} and renders horizontal scroller + ScrollNextButton on the right edge — exactly the Figma layout. Decomposition `title` → `heading`.
`SyllabusCard` is 294px wide, bordered rounded-lg card with title + body — matches Figma 294x148 spec.

`ScrollNextButton` is a 46px round brand-primary button with ArrowUpRight icon. The Figma 46x46 ellipse with up-arrow at 1:7817 / 1:8070 matches both in shape and reuse across syllabus + instructors sections (existing InstructorsSection already wires it in).

Existing `EligibilitySection` accepts a SINGLE `image` prop and renders a left-image + right-checklist split. The new Figma node 1:7996 has TWO flanking images (leftImage + rightImage) wrapping a centered eyebrow/heading/3-item checklist on a tinted full-bleed band. Composition is structurally different (centered content + two side photos vs. split left/right). User constraint: do not modify existing primitives — so build a sibling section component instead of extending.
`ChecklistItem` is a bordered row with a circular check glyph + label — matches Figma checklist exactly.
`InstructorsSection` takes {eyebrow,heading,instructors:[{name,role,avatar}],nextHref}. Already wires the shared ScrollNextButton. Maps 1:1 to Figma 1:7770. Decomposition `title` → `heading`.
`InstructorCard` is a row with circular 98px avatar + name (h5) + role (subtext-1). Matches Figma 364x126 card.
`FaqSection` takes {eyebrow,heading,items:[{question,answer,defaultOpen}]}. Matches Figma 1:7821 with first item defaultOpen=true.

`FaqItem` renders question with Plus/Minus toggle that swaps on open, with answer body below. Matches Figma '+'-to-'×' accordion behavior (existing uses minus icon, which is acceptable visual variant of the same affordance).

`PopularCoursesSection` takes {eyebrow,heading,subhead,courses[{title,image,meta,instructor,ctaLabel,ctaHref}]}. Decomposition `title` → `heading`, `body` → `subhead`. 3-col ProgramCard grid matches Figma layout. Build-planner will map Figma course props: duration/mode/language → meta[]; instructorInitials/instructorName → instructor.
`ProgramCard` accepts {title,href,imageSrc,imageAlt,meta,cta,instructor:{name,initials,avatar},priority}. Already consumed by PopularCoursesSection. Matches Figma 411x512 card.

`FooterBrandCta` takes {brand,heading,body,ctaLabel,ctaHref}. Decomposition `headline` → `heading`. Centered brand serif eyebrow + huge headline + body + pill CTA matches the Figma 339:8455 top half of footer band. Heading split-italic logic already in place via splitHeading().

Existing `layout/footer.tsx` is hardcoded (Studio/Practice/Connect columns, 'Bodhi Yoga Studio' copyright, no props). The new Figma 339:8402 footer has different content (School/Visit/Stay close columns, tagline, website link, signature 'Designed quietly. Practised daily.'). Existing Footer is not data-driven so reuse-as-is would render the wrong content. User constraint: do not modify existing components — build a new prop-driven SiteFooter sibling.
